raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Tasha Boerner was able to secure state funds protecting Medi-Cal coverage for zero to five year-olds.",
    "As of June 2023, redeterminations for Medi-Cal have returned, with federal flexibilities expected to end in December 2024.",
    "As of November 2023, 92% of Californians have been procedurally disenrolled from Medi-Cal after the rollback of federal flexibilities.",
    "One third of those procedurally disenrolled from Medi-Cal in California are children.",
    "The Latine community continues to be the most impacted by the Medi-Cal disenrollment crisis, with over 800,000 disenrollments in the last 12 months.",
    "California's budget includes multi-year Medi-Cal eligibility for children ages 0-5, ensuring they do not experience gaps in health care during critical development times."
  ]
}
```
